_comment: Sample cron schedule for a Human | AI Agent Partnership activation. Handbook Chapter 6.

heartbeat.description: Autonomous operational pulse. Executes prioritized task list (Chapter 6.1).

crons.name: daily-briefing
crons.description: Voice briefing: overnight events, calendar, open items, scout findings.

crons.name: email-triage
crons.description: Scan all email accounts for unread client messages. Security scan, classify, route.

crons.name: innovation-scout
crons.description: Nightly web research on industry trends. Auto-ingest findings to KB.

crons.name: meta-cron
crons.description: Daily health check of all cron jobs. Auto-repair broken crons.

crons.name: security-council
crons.description: Nightly security audit: permissions, gateway config, secret exposure scan.

crons.name: memory-distillation
crons.description: Every 3 days: distill daily logs into MEMORY.md long-term summary.

crons.name: contact-harvester
crons.description: Extract new contacts from email headers, cross-reference CRM, create entries.

crons.name: accountability-check
crons.description: 3x weekday: check open threads for overdue items, flag to principal.
